title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Industrial Development Bank (Transfer of Undertaking and Repeal) Act, 2003. (2) It shall come into force on such date 1 as the Central Government may, by notification, appoint.
footnote: 1. 2nd July, 2004, vide notification No. S.O. 769(E) dated 2nd July, 2004, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
